---
title: "Nick Katz"
image: images/_DSC3439.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 30em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nick-katz-97bb04255/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nickkatz625
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:nickkatz575@gmail.com"
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/katzperformanceandtraining/
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    
---

## RTT Specialist | Pitching Analyst | Ping-pong Enthusiast 

::: {.recent-news-panel}
### Recent Updates

**Layback Podcast episode OUT NOW** I was honored to hop on the layback podcast with Adam Moreau to talk shop on all things impulses and rehab.  
[Watch here! &rarr;](https://youtu.be/XVqAdkR39-M?si=SxaqlieEFDToBfvN)

***

**SQL Force Plate Database** The building blocks of creating a facility wide DB in SQL
[Read Full Analysis &rarr;](#)

:::
